semantic.role: Vitest test suite for validating index-based resume recovery and LLM retry mechanisms in the ArchSpine system.
responsibilities: Creates isolated temporary directories for each test case to avoid side effects and ensure test isolation.
Mocks LLM summarization task failures via vi.fn().mockRejectedValue to simulate retry scenarios and verify resilience.
Verifies the system correctly recovers from partial or corrupted index states by writing incomplete index files and triggering recovery logic.
Validates integration of task state, telemetry state, and protocol versioning within recovery workflows.
Cleans up all test artifacts and restores mocks after each test run to maintain a pristine environment.
outOfScope: Production runtime behavior and performance characteristics are not tested.
Network-level failures or external service integration beyond mocked LLM tasks.
invariants: Each test must run in a uniquely created temporary directory to prevent cross-test contamination.
All mocks must be restored after each test to avoid side effects across the suite.
Test artifacts must be removed after each test run to ensure no persistent state.
The test suite should not depend on external network access or real LLM endpoints.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a reliable test harness for the index-based resume recovery mechanism, ensuring the system can recover from incomplete or corrupted state during AI-powered summarization tasks.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Part of the initial ArchSpine v1.0.0 release focusing on architectural governance and semantic layer testing for recovery resilience.

Simplified Chinese.role: 用于验证 ArchSpine 系统中基于索引的恢复机制和 LLM 重试策略的 Vitest 测试套件。
responsibilities: 为每个测试用例创建独立的临时目录，避免副作用并确保测试隔离。
通过 vi.fn().mockRejectedValue 模拟 LLM 摘要任务失败，模拟重试场景并验证弹性。
通过写入不完整的索引文件并触发恢复逻辑，验证系统能否从部分或损坏的索引状态正确恢复。
验证恢复工作流中任务状态、遥测状态和协议版本控制的集成。
每次测试运行后清理所有测试工件并恢复模拟，以保持环境整洁。
outOfScope: 未测试生产运行时行为和性能特征。
未测试网络级故障或模拟 LLM 任务之外的外部服务集成。
未测试端到端的 CLI 或 UI 工作流。
